texto: Why are we here? Why didn't God just make us and place us in Heaven? What is this place called Earth we're sent to reside in until we're called to live in Heaven for eternity? Training Camp Earth...it is the reason we're here. It is simply a training camp of lesson after lesson to build strength and our relationship with God before we go home. What lesson is God working on in your life today?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kimberly Loving Ross que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Why are we here? Why didn't God just make us and place us in Heaven? What is this place called Ea…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, god, heaven, com foco em dia-chuvoso e trabalho.
